export class BlackjackStateParser{constructor(){this._data=null;}flush(){this._data=null;return true;}parse(wrapper){if(!wrapper)return false;try{var _bytesAvailable;const tableId=wrapper.readInt();const phaseRaw=wrapper.readString();const phase=['WAITING','BETTING','DEALING','PLAYING','PAYOUT'].includes(phaseRaw)?phaseRaw:'WAITING';const minBet=wrapper.readInt();const maxBet=wrapper.readInt();const dealerCount=wrapper.readInt();const dealerCards=[];for(let i=0;i<dealerCount;i++)dealerCards.push(wrapper.readString());const dealerReveal=wrapper.readBoolean();const dealerTotal=wrapper.readInt();const playersCount=wrapper.readInt();const players=[];for(let i=0;i<playersCount;i++){const userId=wrapper.readInt();const name=wrapper.readString();const seat=wrapper.readInt();const bet=wrapper.readInt();const handLen=wrapper.readInt();const hand=[];for(let h=0;h<handLen;h++)hand.push(wrapper.readString());const total=wrapper.readInt();const turn=wrapper.readBoolean();const bust=wrapper.readBoolean();const stand=wrapper.readBoolean();const blackjack=wrapper.readBoolean();const hasDelta=wrapper.readBoolean();const delta=hasDelta?wrapper.readInt():null;players.push({userId,name,seat,bet,hand,total,turn,bust,stand,blackjack,delta});}const endsInMs=wrapper.readInt();// FINAL: myUserId
let myUserId=0;try{myUserId=wrapper.readInt();if(Number.isNaN(myUserId))myUserId=0;}catch(e){console.warn('[BJ:Parser] Packet had no trailing myUserId; defaulting to 0');myUserId=0;}this._data={tableId,phase,minBet,maxBet,dealerCards,dealerReveal,dealerTotal,players,endsInMs,myUserId};// Drift check if available
const avail=(_bytesAvailable=wrapper.bytesAvailable)!==null&&_bytesAvailable!==void 0?_bytesAvailable:0;if(avail>0){console.warn(`[BJ:Parser] WARNING: ${avail} unread bytes after parse (field order mismatch?)`);}// Debug snapshot
console.debug(`[BJ:Parser] table=${tableId} phase=${phase} limits=${minBet}-${maxBet}`+` dealer=(${dealerCards.join(',')}) reveal=${dealerReveal} dTotal=${dealerTotal}`+` players=${players.length} endsInMs=${endsInMs} myUserId=${myUserId}`);return true;}catch(err){console.error('[BJ:Parser] failed:',err);this._data=null;return false;}}get data(){return this._data;}}
